entries.notes: Quarterly scheduled maintenance of telescope drive system completed. Lubrication and alignment verified.
L-band receiver calibration service completed. Noise figure and gain within specification.
Emergency repair of feed positioner 02 motor assembly in progress. Observations on hold.
Annual structural inspection of antenna dish surface planned. Scheduled for next maintenance window.
FPGA firmware update deferred pending validation of new firmware version in test environment.
